title: rubus × admixtus
intro: Rubus × admixtus is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between the Fragaria x ananassa (strawberry) and the Rubus (blackberry or raspberry) genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × admixtus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its berries are consumed fresh or used in jams and preserves.
